title: Conflict Desert Storm
notes: XBOX 360 Controller messes up during missions, forcing player to restart game without controller. Controller misses return button inside menus, making navigating submenus impossible. Completely stable without controller.
Nothing to say, its just launches and plays exactly like on Windows.
